studies.title: My7steps App Trial Study
studies.brief_summary:
The purpose of the "My7steps App Trial Study" is to test the effectiveness of the health application "My7steps App", which was developed for depressive symptoms.
The intervention aims to simplify access to mental health care and reduce waiting times.
During the treatment, which lasts up to eight weeks, psychotherapeutic principles are implemented digitally. Before and after the treatment, the study participants will be questioned in personal interviews. The interviews are conducted in German, English or Dari/Farsi.
Patients in German standard care who are either waiting for a place in therapy or who want to try out the application as an alternative to clinical offers in the healthcare system can take part. The participation offer is aimed at people who are 18 years of age or older and suffer from depressive symptoms.
The primary aim of the study is to check whether the care of those affected from the spectrum of depressive illnesses is improved by the web application My7steps App f
